scripts.dev: GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go run ./cmd/api
scripts.build: mkdir -p /tmp/infraup-generator /tmp/infraup-go-cache /tmp/infraup-go-modcache /tmp/infraup-go-tmp && GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go build -o /tmp/infraup-generator/api ./cmd/api && GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go build -o /tmp/infraup-generator/sync ./cmd/sync && GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go build -o /tmp/infraup-generator/scaffold ./cmd/scaffold
scripts.sync: GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go run ./cmd/sync
scripts.test: mkdir -p /tmp/infraup-go-cache /tmp/infraup-go-modcache /tmp/infraup-go-tmp && GOCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/infraup-go-modcache GOTMPDIR=/tmp/infraup-go-tmp node ../../scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs go test ./...
